headline: Tractor Supply Q2 Earnings Preview: What Should Investors Know?
summary: TSCO's Q2'26 outlook points to y/y revenue and EPS growth, supported by gross-margin gains despite higher SG&A costs and soft discretionary demand.

headline: Tractor Supply (TSCO) Reports Next Week: Wall Street Expects Earnings Growth
summary: Tractor Supply (TSCO) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
